description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears metallic and is uniformly dark in color, suggesting a steel or iron composition with a matte or oxidized finish. The crossguard is simple and straight, extending horizontally from the base of the blade, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and elongated, ending in a rounded pommel, which may serve as a counterweight for balance. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on the blade, guard, or handle, giving the sword a utilitarian and functional appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of a medieval longsword, suitable for two-handed use.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a simple crossguard and a rounded pommel, finished in a dark metallic color. The design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and handle, with the crossguard barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, metallic, rounded pommel, no visible grip texture or wrapping
